title: Glass Apothecary Jars Clear Elegant Decorative Buffet Jars Wedding Candy Organizer Storage Canisters Small Home Decor 2 Pcs
description:
About this item
Glass Apothecary Jars ：Made from high quality hand-blown high-end sturdy clear glass，A little air bubbles on the bottle body is normal.
Beautiful Glass Jar: These footed classic style apothecary jars have a unique shape that works for every setting from bathroom and kitchen storage, to home and venue decoration, garden floral and terrarium displays, and more. They has a separate clear glass lid with a round handle for easy opening and closing.
Wide Scope of Application: Those Clear Glass Apothecary Jars ideal for personal use and special events like weddings, receptions, buffets, holiday and family gatherings, buffets and all kinds of parties.
Decorative glass jar :These Glass Apothecary Jars is great for displaying decorative spheres, fruit, stones, flowers, or any other item you wish to coordinate with your decor. Fill it with Christmas ornaments during the holidays, with lemons for a gorgeous table or kitchen display, with glass pebbles and flowers, or fill it with potpourri!
Note:If received broken Please contact us , we will responsible for it.

reviews_5s: Perfect, durable and easy to clean, love these jars, perfect for candy display tables!I filled these with some sand and blue ocean glass I also got on Amazon. Love the way they turned outGood quality and fit the asthetic k was going for but are a bit smaller than I thought. Bought them to hold Epson salts and bath bombs but they can't hold as much as I expected.I gave it 4 stars for being sturdy only because one came broken but Amazon sent a replacement before I returned the original order. The replacement came fast and intact. Other than the broken one I love them and they are the perfect size.I got these to make a permanent home for my daughter’s science project. The class used 2 liter bottles and I wanted to recycle the plastic and replace it with something sturdy and these jars were perfect. I just had to drill a small hole to pass the string through for watering.I’ll take a picture next time I use them but they were perfect for my event. I only bought 1 bag of large gum balls and it filled up both of these containers. Great for small events.I use my Apothecary jars for lemons and limes and oranges! They sit on my kitchen counter and I get a lot of compliments on them. I do think they were expensive but they were worth the moneyShe enjoyed this so much, tho the price was a lil pricey, she still managed to use it for her decoration.I love them so much please bye I couldn't believe how pretty they were I couldn't wait to feel candy in them love them 🤩🤩🤩♥️♥️♥️🤗👍

It came in a set of 2 and one jar was perfect. Tge second box, you could hear the broken glass without even opening it.For the price these should have been flawless and clean. Bubbles are in the glass and used looking. Cannot even contract the seller.
